name: PURE SCIENCE GOLF - Feather Sound
about: Pure Science Golf - Feather Sound is an indoor golf venue dedicated to the technical and analytical aspects of the game. As suggested by the name, the facility focuses on precision, leveraging advanced data and monitoring to help golfers understand and improve their swing mechanics. The venue provides a controlled environment where players can focus on their game without the variables of weather or course conditions, making it suitable for year-round practice and skill development. The atmosphere is likely centered around serious game improvement and performance analysis, appealing to those who want to merge the physical game with scientific data. While primarily focused on the golfing experience, the facility offers secure online booking and checkout systems for user convenience.

simulator_hardware.notes: Technology specifics not listed on website

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While bringing your own clubs is recommended for the most accurate data analysis, you should contact the venue directly to confirm if rental sets are available on-site.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Policies regarding outside food and beverages are not specified on the website. Please check with the staff before bringing your own refreshments.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A typical round of 18 holes on a golf simulator takes approximately 45 to 60 minutes, depending on the pace of play and the software settings used.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, indoor golf simulators are generally family-friendly and provide a safe, accessible environment for juniors and youth to learn the game.
